compiled_state.title: Add interaction:deferred entry gates to preplanning/SKILL.md and implementation-plan/SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Add interaction:deferred entry gates to preplanning and implementation-plan skills, following the scrutiny:pending gate pattern exactly.

**preplanning/SKILL.md** (add gate at entry, same location as scrutiny:pending gate at lines 83-89):
- Check epic for interaction:deferred tag using .claude/scripts/dso ticket show <epic-id>
- If tag present: HALT immediately. Output: 'This epic has unresolved cross-epic interaction signals (ambiguity or conflict). Re-run /dso:brainstorm <epic-id> interactively to resolve the interaction before decomposing into stories.'
- If tag absent: proceed normally
- Reference: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/interaction-deferred-tag.md

**implementation-plan/SKILL.md** (add gate at Scrutiny Gate section, same location as scrutiny:pending gate at lines 126-132):
- Same tag check pattern
- Halt message: 'This epic has unresolved cross-epic interaction signals. Re-run /dso:brainstorm <epic-id> interactively to resolve the interaction, then retry /dso:implementation-plan.'
- Reference: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/interaction-deferred-tag.md

Both gates follow the scrutiny:pending presence-based check: block when tag IS present; absent tag (including pre-existing epics without the tag) proceeds normally.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md (MODIFY)
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md (MODIFY)

## Dependencies
Blocked by: 1e39-47bf (RED test), ad95-05b1 (contract doc must exist)
